style_direction: Chinese ink-and-wash digital character art with directional dry-brush, ink-led blue-gray values, sparse silver highlights, and lost-and-found edges.

character_direction.pose: guarded side twist after a rapid turn, spear drawn diagonally behind the far shoulder
character_direction.eye_line: calm alert focus over the forward shoulder

head_design: helmetless dark blue-black high tied ponytail with pale-cyan cloth ribbon; no metal headpiece or forehead ornament
